mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solution_comment (solution_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{comment.solutionId}, #{comment.userId}, #{comment.content})
INSERT INTO solution_comment (solution_id, user_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (#{comment.solutionId}, #{comment.userId}, #{comment.content}, #{comment.parentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE solution_comment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE solution_comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, s.solution_id AS solution_id, s.user_id AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.avatar AS avatar, s.parent_id AS parent_id, s.content AS content, s.like_count AS like_count, s.create_time AS create_time FROM solution_comment s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE solution_id = #{solutionId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
